title: BlackTitle
description: A minimalist Forge mod that creates immersive full-screen text overlays with smooth fade animations for cinematic Minecraft experiences.
body:
✨ **Key Features**

    Full-screen black overlays with customizable white text

    Silky smooth animations - fade in, hold, fade out

    Complete customization via commands:

-         Fade speeds (in/out)
-         Display duration
-         Text scale

    Seamless integration - no configs needed

    Non-intrusive - doesn't conflict with other mods

🎮 **Commands**

    /overlay <text> - Display overlay

    /overlayconfig <fadeIn> <fadeOut> <delay> <scale> - Tune animations

🎬 **Perfect For**

    Cinematic cutscenes

    Storytelling moments

    Roleplay scenarios

    Streamer transitions

    Mysterious messages

    Chapter titles and timers

🔧 **Technical**

    Forge compatible

    Client-side only

    Lightweight - no performance impact
